rulings.Case Title: HERB ROMINE et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 9, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Carrier Corp.¿s motion for summary judgment and alternative motion for summary adjudication are denied. There is a triable issue of material fact as to whether Plaintiff Herb Romine knew or should have known of the hazards of exposure to asbestos caused by working with Carrier¿s products and whether he was, therefore, a sophisticated user under Johnson v. American Standard (2008) 43 Cal.4th 56. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
